title: Double Door
writer: Jack Cunningham, Gladys Lehman, Elizabeth McFadden
actors: Evelyn Venable, Mary Morris, Anne Revere
plot: In New York in 1910, wealthy spinster Victoria Van Brett controls with an iron hand both the family fortune and the lives of her younger sister Caroline and half brother Rip. When Rip marries Anne Darrow, a nurse who saved his lif...
